metadata.name: sui_sentinel
metadata.description: Sui Sentinel - AI Agent Security Platform on Solana

instructions.name: claim_fees
docs: Claim accumulated creator fees

instructions.name: consume_prompt
docs: Consume prompt with enclave signature verification

instructions.name: fund_agent
docs: Fund an agent's reward pool

instructions.name: init_agent_vaults
docs: Initialize agent vault accounts (must be called after register_agent)

accounts.name: agent_vault
docs: Agent's token account for holding rewards

accounts.name: agent_fees_vault
docs: Agent's token account for accumulated fees

instructions.name: initialize
docs: Initialize the protocol configuration

instructions.name: pause_protocol
docs: Pause the protocol

instructions.name: register_agent
docs: Register a new agent with enclave signature verification
Note: Call init_agent_vaults after this to create vault accounts

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: The token mint for this agent

instructions.name: request_attack
docs: Request an attack on an agent

accounts.name: protocol_wallet_token_account
docs: Protocol wallet's token account

instructions.name: set_enclave_pubkey
docs: Set the canonical enclave public key (can only be called once)

instructions.name: transfer_admin
docs: Transfer admin role to a new address

instructions.name: unpause_protocol
docs: Unpause the protocol

instructions.name: update_agent_cost
docs: Update agent cost (within 3 hour window)

instructions.name: update_agent_prompt_hash
docs: Update agent prompt hash (within 3 hour window)

instructions.name: update_dynamic_fee_settings
docs: Update dynamic fee settings

instructions.name: update_enclave_pubkey
docs: Update the canonical enclave public key

instructions.name: update_fee_ratios
docs: Update fee distribution ratios

instructions.name: update_protocol_wallet
docs: Update the protocol wallet address

instructions.name: withdraw_from_agent
docs: Withdraw from agent balance (after lock period)

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: caller is not the admin or owner

errors.name: ProtocolPaused
errors.msg: Protocol is currently paused

errors.name: EnclaveNotSet
errors.msg: Enclave public key has not been set

errors.name: EnclaveAlreadySet
errors.msg: Enclave public key has already been set, use update instead

errors.name: InvalidFeeRatios
errors.msg: Invalid fee ratios: must sum to 10000 basis points

errors.name: InvalidProtocolWallet
errors.msg: Invalid protocol wallet address

errors.name: InvalidMaxFeeMultiplier
errors.msg: Max fee multiplier must be at least 10000 (1x)

errors.name: AgentIdTooLong
errors.msg: Agent ID is too long (max 32 characters)

errors.name: AgentAlreadyDefeated
errors.msg: Agent has already been defeated

errors.name: UpdateWindowExpired
errors.msg: Update window has expired (3 hours after creation)

errors.name: WithdrawalLocked
errors.msg: Withdrawal is still locked (14 days from last funding)

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient balance for withdrawal

errors.name: InvalidAttack
errors.msg: Invalid attack: agent or attacker mismatch

errors.name: InvalidSignature
errors.msg: Invalid signature: verification failed

errors.name: SignatureExpired
errors.msg: Signature has expired

errors.name: SignatureInFuture
errors.msg: Signature timestamp is in the future

errors.name: Ed25519InstructionNotFound
errors.msg: Ed25519 program instruction not found

errors.name: InvalidEd25519InstructionData
errors.msg: Invalid Ed25519 instruction data

errors.name: Ed25519VerificationFailed
errors.msg: Ed25519 signature verification failed

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow occurred

errors.name: InvalidInstructionsSysvar
errors.msg: Invalid instruction sysvar

errors.name: VaultsAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: Agent vaults have already been initialized

errors.name: InvalidTokenMint
errors.msg: Token mint does not match agent's token mint

types.name: Agent
docs: Agent account - represents an AI agent that can be attacked

fields.name: agent_id
docs: Unique identifier for the agent

fields.name: owner
docs: Owner/creator of the agent

fields.name: token_mint
docs: Token mint used for payments

fields.name: cost_per_message
docs: Cost per message in token base units

fields.name: prompt_hash
docs: Hash of the AI system prompt (full prompt stored off-chain)

fields.name: created_at
docs: Timestamp when agent was created

fields.name: last_funded_timestamp
docs: Timestamp when agent was last funded
Used to calculate withdrawal lock period

fields.name: attack_count
docs: Number of attacks received
Used for dynamic fee calculation

fields.name: is_defeated
docs: Whether the agent has been defeated

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for agent PDA

fields.name: vault_bump
docs: Bump seed for agent vault PDA

fields.name: fees_vault_bump
docs: Bump seed for agent fees vault PDA

types.name: Attack
docs: Attack account - represents an ongoing attack

fields.name: agent
docs: The agent being attacked

fields.name: attacker
docs: The attacker's address

fields.name: paid_amount
docs: Amount paid for the attack

fields.name: nonce
docs: Random nonce for uniqueness

fields.name: created_at
docs: Timestamp when attack was initiated

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA

types.name: ProtocolConfig
docs: Protocol configuration account - stores global settings

fields.name: admin
docs: Admin address that can update config

fields.name: protocol_wallet
docs: Protocol wallet that receives protocol fees

fields.name: agent_balance_fee
docs: Fee allocated to agent reward pool (in basis points)

fields.name: creator_fee
docs: Fee allocated to agent creator (in basis points)

fields.name: protocol_fee
docs: Fee allocated to protocol (in basis points)

fields.name: enclave_pubkey
docs: The canonical enclave public key (Ed25519, 32 bytes)
Only signatures from this enclave are valid

fields.name: fee_increase_bps
docs: Dynamic fee increase per attack (in basis points)
Default: 100 (1% per attack)

fields.name: max_fee_multiplier_bps
docs: Maximum fee multiplier cap (in basis points)
Default: 30000 (3x)

fields.name: is_paused
docs: Protocol pause flag

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA

fields.name: total_agents
docs: Total agents registered
